critical.issue: ~15 hardcoded French strings bypass i18n system entirely — breaks 9-language support
critical.fix: Extract all hardcoded French strings into i18n keys via tr()

critical.issue: CLI supersplat mode has hardcoded French output bypassing i18n
critical.fix: Route through tr() with proper i18n keys

critical.issue: Bare except in load_config(), save_config(), and tr() silently swallows all errors
AppLifecycle.restart() uses shell=True with string interpolation of argv — command injection risk
critical.fix: Use Popen with list args instead of shell=True

warnings.issue: tr() called at module parse time for argparse — language baked at import, fragile .replace('v0.8','v0.9') for version
warnings.fix: Use VERSION constant, build parser inside main()

warnings.issue: PyQt6 unconditionally imported even for CLI-only operations — fails on headless servers
warnings.fix: Defer PyQt6 imports to GUI branch only

warnings.issue: Inconsistent worker lifecycle — some init to None, others use hasattr()
warnings.fix: Initialize all workers to None in __init__

warnings.issue: No version pinning on major deps (PyQt6, requests, etc.) — non-reproducible builds
CUDA detection uses naive nvidia-smi heuristic
warnings.fix: Use torch.cuda.is_available() when torch is available

warnings.issue: psutil used but not in requirements.txt
reset_factory() rm -rf via shell with race condition
curl | sh for Rust install — RCE if URL/DNS compromised
warnings.fix: Download to temp file, verify hash, then execute

warnings.issue: VERSION='0.9' but locale files say 'v0.8', patched via string replace
warnings.fix: Use VERSION constant directly in cli_desc

info.issue: LanguageManager singleton instantiated at import time — triggers file I/O as import side effect
de.json has orphaned key 'brush_build_mode' not in other locales
info.fix: Remove or add to all locales

info.issue: load_config() uses relative Path('config.json') — wrong dir if CWD differs

info.fix: Expand or replace with proper test framework

info.issue: Observer list uses direct references — potential memory leak if widget destroyed without removing observer
info.fix: Use weakref callbacks or add remove_observer()
